context: Internal validation helper for the comma R package. Used by all exported functions that accept a mod_type argument.

edge_cases: mod_type is NULL → returns all valid mod_types (character vector)
mod_type not in valid → stops with error listing valid values
expected.scoring_notes: Must identify all 3 edge cases. Partial credit for 2/3. Full credit requires describing what the function does for each case, not just listing the condition.

context: Exported function in the comma R package. Annotates methylation sites with genomic features.

edge_cases: object is not commaData → stops with error
annotation is not CompressedGRangesList → stops with error
motifSites is NULL → message and skip motif annotation
upstream or downstream is negative → stops with error
object has no sites → warning and return empty annotation
expected.scoring_notes: Must identify all 5 edge cases. Partial credit for each found. Note that motifSites=NULL is a soft edge case (message, not error) and length==0 is also soft (warning + early return).

context: Internal helper for the comma R package. Implements circular indexing for slidingWindow (wrapping around chromosome ends).

edge_cases: x is not numeric → stops with error
x in (0, n] → returns x directly
x is 0 or n+1 → returns n (boundary wrap)
x is negative with abs(x) <= n → returns n+x+1 (reverse indexing)
expected.scoring_notes: 8 edge cases total. This is a harder test — many branches. Partial credit proportional to cases found. The NA case and the boundary cases (0, n+1) are easy to miss.
